title: Velvety Japanese Ferment Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix umami and velvety dish featuring halal-friendly Japanese fries combined with a tangy ferment for an irresistible meal.

ingredients.name: Halal-friendly Tamari or Kikkoman Soy Sauce

instructions: Preheat a wok over medium-high heat.
Add vegetable oil and fries to the wok. Cook for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Drain excess oil from the fries, set aside in a warm place.
In the same wok, add umami seasoning (adjust amount based on preference) and fermented vegetables. Stir-fry for another minute.
Add fries back into the wok with the fermented vegetables. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Finish by adding halal-friendly tamari or Kikkoman Soy Sauce and mix thoroughly.
Serve immediately as a quick-fix snack.
